center.name: 蘇皮奧里島
center.summary: 蘇皮奧里島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Geelvink fruit dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to several islands, including Biak, Supiori, Numfor, and the smaller Padaido Islands, collectively known as the Schouten or Geelvink Islands, which lie north of New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to several islands, including Biak, Supiori, Numfor, and the smaller Padaido Islands, collectively known as the Schouten or Geelvink Islands, which lie north of New Guinea
